About Us

Smart Medicine
For Everyone

Smart Mode LLC was established in 2017 and operates in the medical device industry. We focus on delivering modern, smart, and portable solutions that improve accessibility and efficiency in healthcare services.

From wearable health monitors to AI-driven diagnostic platforms, we bridge the gap between cutting-edge technology and everyday clinical practice — making quality care available anywhere, anytime.

2017
Founded in Mongolia

Our Foundation

Mission, Vision &
Core Values

🎯

Our Mission

To enhance healthcare quality by providing easy-to-use, portable, and highly efficient medical devices that empower clinicians and patients alike.

🏔️

Our Vision

To become a leading provider of smart and portable medical technologies — making advanced healthcare accessible across Mongolia and beyond.

✅

Quality

Uncompromising standards in every device we deliver

💡

Innovation

Continuously pushing boundaries of medical technology

🤝

Trust

Building lasting relationships with clients and partners

What We Offer

Our Services

01

Smart Medical Devices

Wearables and connected devices empowering real-time health monitoring and proactive care. From smartwatches with biometric sensors to cloud-connected diagnostic tools.

02

Portable Diagnostic Equipment

Compact, accurate, and reliable diagnostic devices for any clinical setting — hospital ward, remote clinic, or field deployment. No compromise on precision.

03

Technology-Driven Healthcare Solutions

Digital platforms and AI-powered solutions driving data-driven decisions and better patient outcomes. Smarter workflows, smarter care.

Portfolio

Our Main Brands

Ten specialized brands, one unified vision — delivering smarter healthcare technology.

Why SmartMODE

Competitive Advantages

🪶

Portable & Lightweight

Designed for mobility without sacrificing clinical-grade accuracy or reliability in any environment.

🔄

Alternative to Bulky Equipment

Replace room-sized machines with pocket-sized powerhouses. Same results, radically better form factor.

📍

Usable Anywhere, Anytime

From hospital wards to remote rural clinics — SmartMODE devices work wherever patients need care.

🤖

Built on Modern Technologies

AI, IoT, and cloud connectivity built-in. Devices that learn, adapt, and improve outcomes over time.
